data.param: {"input":"{\"image_input\":[],\"aspect_ratio\":\"16:9\",\"output_format\":\"png\",\"prompt\":\"Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.\\nRole: inline.\\nPurpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..\\nDiagram type: workflow_map.\\nConcept summary: Mamba-2 当年押注的是训练效率，所以通过大量简化底层状态空间机制，换来了 2 到 8 倍的训练提速。但今天的瓶颈已经不只在预训练。部署、后训练、强化学习 rollout，以及 Codex、Claude Code 这类 agent workflow，都把“推理是不是够便宜、….\\nStyle direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.\\nBackground: warm cream paper-like background.\\nPrimary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.\\nLine work: soft dark gray line work.\\nScene elements: pipeline blocks, arrows, input/output artifacts, step modules.\\nKey relationships to visualize: show sequence and handoff, make the operating logic obvious at a glance.\\nLayout pattern: single_concept_centered.\\nDiagram focus: one section concept.\\nText position: integrated.\\nOn-canvas headline: \\\"Mamba-2 解决的是训练瓶颈，Mamba-3 盯上…\\\".\\nOn-canvas subheadline: \\\"Mamba-2 当年押注的是训练效率，所以通过大量简化底层状态空间机制…\\\".\\nUse short Chinese labels only: Mamba-2 解决的是训练瓶颈, Mamba-3 盯上的是推理瓶颈.\\nMust have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover.\\nMust avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons.\\nAdditional direction: Visualize this section's main idea: Mamba-2 解决的是训练瓶颈，Mamba-3 盯上的是推理瓶颈.\\nThe result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.\\nKeep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.\",\"resolution\":\"1K\"}","model":"nano-banana-2"}
